summary: P0-3 Middleware Stability & P0-4 Meilisearch Timeout/Settings Hardening - All features verified: rbac_hard_lock try/except + response none guard, fail_safe_response_guard middleware, /api/health/search endpoint, search degrade mode payload format (SEARCH_DEGRADED, degraded, retry_after_seconds), /api/v2/search regression, non-blocking meili settings sync, Sentry gate

rbac_hard_lock_middleware.details: Middleware returns 401 for unauthenticated admin paths, allows non-admin paths through, has try/except + response None guard

fail_safe_response_guard_middleware.details: Middleware registered at line 1848, returns JSON 500 with error_code MIDDLEWARE_RESPONSE_NONE or MIDDLEWARE_GUARD_ERROR on exceptions

health_search_endpoint.details: /api/health/search exists at line 33442, returns deterministic 200 (healthy=true, degraded=false) or 503 with degrade payload

search_degrade_payload_format.details: _search_degraded_payload() at line 33331 returns error_code=SEARCH_DEGRADED, degraded=true, retry_after_seconds fields

search_v2_endpoint_regression.details: /api/v2/search at line 33578 responds normally, requires country param (400 if missing), returns degrade response if circuit open

meili_settings_non_blocking_sync.details: _enqueue_meili_settings_sync() queues settings sync instead of blocking, background worker at _meili_settings_sync_worker_loop() handles retries with circuit breaker

sentry_integration_gate.details: SENTRY_DSN check at line 1733 (lifespan) and 4203 (env var), app runs without SENTRY_DSN, init path doesn't break startup

dealer_login_regression.details: Dealer login works with dealer@platform.com / Dealer123!, redirects to /dealer/overview

code_review_findings.rbac_hard_lock_try_except: Lines 2040-2099: Full try/except block wraps middleware, returns JSON 500 with RBAC_GUARD_ERROR on exception
code_review_findings.response_none_guard: Lines 2045-2046, 2068-2069, 2086-2087: Multiple None checks return RBAC_RESPONSE_NONE error
code_review_findings.fail_safe_guard: Lines 1848-1877: fail_safe_response_guard wraps call_next with try/except, handles response=None and exceptions
code_review_findings.search_degraded_payload: Lines 33331-33343: _search_degraded_payload() returns error_code, degraded, retry_after_seconds with optional reason/last_error_at
code_review_findings.health_search_503_format: Lines 33453-33469: 503 response includes required fields: error_code, degraded, retry_after_seconds, healthy, runtime
code_review_findings.meili_circuit_breaker: Lines 33414-33420: Circuit opens after MEILI_SETTINGS_CIRCUIT_THRESHOLD (3) failures, stays open for MEILI_SETTINGS_CIRCUIT_OPEN_SECONDS (60s)
code_review_findings.non_blocking_queue: Lines 33367-33380: _enqueue_meili_settings_sync() uses asyncio.Queue, won't block if queue full (just logs warning)
code_review_findings.sentry_gate: Lines 1733-1739: SENTRY_DSN conditional check before sentry_sdk.init(), app runs without it

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0-3/P0-4 FAZ-2 features verified. rbac_hard_lock middleware has try/except guards with JSON 500 fallback. fail_safe_response_guard is the outermost middleware catching unhandled exceptions. /api/health/search returns deterministic 200/503 with proper degrade payload format. Meilisearch settings sync is non-blocking via background queue with circuit breaker. Sentry integration is gated by SENTRY_DSN env var presence.

verified_requirements.1_rbac_hard_lock_try_except: PASS - All paths return deterministic response, exception handler returns JSON 500
verified_requirements.2_fail_safe_guard_middleware: PASS - Middleware at line 1848 catches response=None and exceptions, returns JSON 500
verified_requirements.3_health_search_endpoint: PASS - /api/health/search exists, returns 200 healthy or 503 degraded with correct payload
verified_requirements.4_search_degrade_payload: PASS - error_code=SEARCH_DEGRADED, degraded=true, retry_after_seconds present in 503 responses
verified_requirements.5_search_v2_regression: PASS - /api/v2/search works normally, requires country, degrade mode functional
verified_requirements.6_non_blocking_meili_sync: PASS - Background queue approach replaces blocking startup sync
verified_requirements.7_sentry_gate: PASS - App runs without SENTRY_DSN, conditional init doesn't break startup
